text:
Author: jgh
Date: Mon Dec 24 22:33:12 2012
New Revision: 309467

Log:
  - unbreak ICU build
  
  PR:		174603 (based on)

  With hat: pgsql@

Modified:

Modified: head/databases/postgresql84-server/files/extra-patch-icu4

@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@

 -   ])
-+  AC_CHECK_LIB(icui18n, ucol_open_50
++  AC_CHECK_LIB(icui18n, ucol_open_50, [], [
